data.title: Hick's Law Utilization
data.description: Reducing user choice complexity to improve interface decisions.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menu options and categorized tools for streamlined navigation.

data.title: Fitts's Law Application
data.description: Design elements are optimized for quicker access based on size and proximity.
data.technical_spec: Enhanced clickable area for frequently used tools and buttons.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Consistency in visual layout, grouping related elements for cognitive ease.
data.technical_spec: Uniform theming and color palettes across applications.

data.title: Doherty Threshold Implementation
data.description: Meeting user reaction times to enhance usability satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Ensures systems respond uunder 400 ms to keep user attention.

data.title: Jakob’s Law of Internet Assumption
data.description: Keeping design familiarity across applications to match user expectations.
data.technical_spec: UI patterns consistent with common web applications.
